name: Caddies Corner
address: 304 Perry Ave SE, Fort Walton Beach, FL 32548
about: Caddies Corner is a family-friendly bar located in downtown Fort Walton Beach, offering a unique indoor golf simulator experience combined with arcade games, gelato, pizza, and a selection of beer and wine. The venue features a state-of-the-art indoor golf simulator suitable for newbies, pros, and everyone in between, providing an immersive way to practice and enjoy golf in any weather. With an inviting outdoor patio, Caddies Corner is designed as a spot to unwind and have a great time with friends and family. The facility also includes arcade games and serves as a hub for entertainment, making it a versatile destination for both golf and leisure activities.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulator perfect for all skill levels
Family-friendly atmosphere with a mix of golf and entertainment options
Affordable pricing starting at $15 per hour
Convenient downtown location with outdoor patio for relaxation
Offers both practice and social experiences in one venue

food_and_drink.notes: Pizza and gelato are available on-site
Selection of beer and wine is served

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but it's common for golf simulators to provide rental clubs if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers its own food (pizza, gelato) and alcohol (beer, wine) on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard sessions are 1-2 hours for simulator use, which can include multiple rounds.

faq.question: Is Caddies Corner kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, it's explicitly described as a family-friendly venue with arcade games and activities for all ages.
